A

addBooking(String, String, String, HashSet<String>, int) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Creates a new Booking from the supplied parameters, stores it in the in-memory repository, and returns the created instance.
addBookingRow(Booking) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerHomeUI
Adds the given Booking to CustomerHomeUI.currentBookingData and appends a corresponding row to the booking history table.
addMovie(String, String, int, String, String, String, int) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Creates a new Movie from the supplied parameters, stores it in the in-memory repository, immediately appends it to MOVIES.csv via MovieCsvIO.writeMovieData(String), and returns the created instance.
addMovieRow(Movie) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUI
Adds the given Movie to AdminMovieListUI.currentData and appends a corresponding row to the table.
AdminMovieFormUI - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend
Modal dialog that provides a form for administrators to either add a new movie screening or edit an existing one.
AdminMovieListUI - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend
The main administration screen of the Ketchup application.

B

Booking - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model
Represents a single movie ticket booking placed by a registered user.
Booking(String, String, String, LocalDateTime, HashSet<String>, int, boolean) - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Constructs a new Booking with all required fields.
BookingCsvIO - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io
Singleton class responsible for reading and writing booking data to BOOKINGS.csv.
BookingRepository - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories
Static in-memory repository that holds all Booking records for the currently logged-in user.
BookingRepository() - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
 

C

calculateTotalPrice(HashSet<String>, int) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Calculates the total booking price based on the number of chosen seats and the per-seat price of the movie.
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io - package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io
 
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model - package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model
 
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories - package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories
 
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend - package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend
 
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util - package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util
 
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.main - package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.main
 
Credential - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model
Represents a registered user account in the Ketchup application.
Credential(String, String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Credential
Constructs a new Credential with all required account fields.
CredentialCsvIO - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io
Singleton class responsible for reading and writing user credential data to USER_CREDENTIALS.csv.
CredentialRepository - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories
Static in-memory repository that holds all registered Credential records loaded from USER_CREDENTIALS.csv at application startup.
CredentialRepository() - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.CredentialRepository
 
CustomerBookingConfirmUI - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend
Modal confirmation dialog shown to the customer as the final step of the booking flow.
CustomerHomeUI - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend
The main screen presented to a customer after a successful login.
CustomerMovieDetailUI - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend
A read-only detail window that displays the full information of a selected movie screening.
CustomerSeatSelectionUI - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend
Modal dialog that renders an interactive cinema seat map for a selected movie screening, allowing the customer to toggle individual seat selections before proceeding to CustomerBookingConfirmUI.

D

deleteMovie(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Removes the movie record associated with the given ID from the in-memory repository.
displayConfirmationDialog(Component, String, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util.DisplayMessage
Displays a modal Yes/No confirmation dialog with the given message and title, and returns whether the user selected Yes.
displayError(Component, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util.DisplayMessage
Displays a modal error dialog with the given message and an JOptionPane.ERROR_MESSAGE icon.
displayInformation(Component, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util.DisplayMessage
Displays a modal information dialog with the given message and an JOptionPane.INFORMATION_MESSAGE icon.
DisplayMessage - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util
Utility class that centralizes all user-facing dialog box interactions in the Ketchup application.
DisplayMessage() - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util.DisplayMessage
 
displayWarning(Component, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.util.DisplayMessage
Displays a modal warning dialog with the given message and a JOptionPane.WARNING_MESSAGE icon.

E

editMovie(String, Movie) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Replaces the movie record associated with the given ID with the supplied edited Movie object.

F

FileSystemInitializer - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io
Utility class responsible for bootstrapping the Ketchup application's file system structure on startup.
FileSystemInitializer() - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.FileSystemInitializer
 

G

generateCredentialDataAsString(Credential) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.CredentialCsvIO
Serializes a Credential object into a semicolon-delimited CSV row string.
generateDataAsString(Booking) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.BookingCsvIO
Serializes a Booking object into a semicolon-delimited CSV row string.
generateMovieDataAsString(Movie) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.MovieCsvIO
Serializes a Movie object into a semicolon-delimited CSV row string.
getAdminMovieListUI() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUI
Returns the current singleton instance of AdminMovieListUI.
getBookingEmail() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the email address of the user who made this booking.
getBookingId() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the unique identifier of this booking.
getBookings() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Returns the entire in-memory booking map for the current session.
getChosenSeats() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the set of seat IDs selected by the user for this booking.
getCredentials() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.CredentialRepository
Returns the entire in-memory credential map.
getDatetimeFormat() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the shared DateTimeFormatter used throughout the application for parsing and formatting showtime values in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format.
getDuration() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the runtime of this movie in minutes.
getEmail() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Credential
Returns the email address associated with this account.
getGenre() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the genre of this movie.
getIO() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.BookingCsvIO
Returns the singleton instance of BookingCsvIO, creating it on first call.
getIO() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.CredentialCsvIO
Returns the singleton instance of CredentialCsvIO, creating it on first call.
getIO() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.MovieCsvIO
Returns the singleton instance of MovieCsvIO, creating it on first call.
getMainFrame() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUI
Returns the main JFrame of the admin screen.
getMovieId() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the ID of the movie associated with this booking.
getMovieId() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the unique identifier of this movie screening.
getMovies() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Returns the entire in-memory movie map.
getOccupiedSeat() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the set of seat IDs that have already been booked for this screening.
getPassword() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Credential
Returns the password associated with this account.
getRating() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the age rating of this movie.
getSeatPrice() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the price per seat for this screening.
getShowtime() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the scheduled showtime of the booked movie session.
getShowTime() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the scheduled showtime of this screening.
getTitle() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns the title of this movie.
getTotalPrice() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns the total price charged for this booking.
getUser(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.CredentialRepository
Retrieves the Credential associated with the given email address.
getUsername() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Credential
Returns the display name of the user.

I

initalize() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.FileSystemInitializer
Verifies that the Ketchup application directory and all required CSV data files exist, creating any that are missing along with their corresponding header rows.
initialize() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.LoginUI
Creates a new LoginUI instance and makes the login window visible.
initialize() - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.RegisterUI
Creates a new RegisterUI instance and makes the registration window visible.
initialize(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieListUI
Creates a new AdminMovieListUI instance, configures it with the given admin username, and makes the main window visible.
initialize(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerMovieDetailUI
Creates a new CustomerMovieDetailUI instance, loads the details of the specified movie, and makes the window visible.
initialize(String, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.AdminMovieFormUI
Creates a new AdminMovieFormUI instance, configures it for the given mode and movie ID, and displays it as an application-modal dialog.
initialize(String, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerHomeUI
Creates a new CustomerHomeUI instance, configures it with the given username and email, and makes the main window visible.
initialize(String, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerSeatSelectionUI
Creates a new CustomerSeatSelectionUI instance for the specified movie and customer, then displays it as an application-modal dialog.
initialize(String, HashSet<String>, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerBookingConfirmUI
Creates a new CustomerBookingConfirmUI instance, populates it with the provided booking context, and displays it as an application-modal dialog.
isAdmin() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Credential
Returns whether this account has administrator privileges.
isProcessed() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Returns whether this booking has been persisted to BOOKINGS.csv.
isValidEmail(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Credential
Validates whether the given string conforms to a standard email format using a pre-compiled regular expression.

K

KetchupMain - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.main
The main entry point of the Ketchup application.
KetchupMain() - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.main.KetchupMain
 

L

LoginUI - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend
The login screen of the Ketchup application, presented at startup and after every logout.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.main.KetchupMain
The application entry point.
Movie - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model
Represents a single movie screening entry in the Ketchup application.
Movie(String, String, String, int, String, String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Constructs a new Movie from raw string data, as typically read from a CSV row.
MovieCsvIO - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io
Singleton class responsible for reading and writing movie data to MOVIES.csv.
MovieRepository - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories
Static in-memory repository that holds all Movie screening records loaded from MOVIES.csv at application startup.
MovieRepository() - Constructor for class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
 

R

readCsvFile() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.CredentialCsvIO
Reads all user credential records from USER_CREDENTIALS.csv and returns them as a map keyed by email address.
readCsvFile() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.MovieCsvIO
Reads all movie records from MOVIES.csv and returns them as a map keyed by movie ID.
readCsvFile(String) - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.BookingCsvIO
Reads all booking records from the CSV file that belong to the specified user.
register(String, String, String, boolean) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.CredentialRepository
Registers a new user account by creating a Credential and adding it to the in-memory store.
RegisterUI - Class in com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend
The registration screen of the Ketchup application, opened when a new user clicks Register on LoginUI.
removeMovie(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerHomeUI
Removes the movie with the given ID from both CustomerHomeUI.currentMovieData and the movie table.

S

searchBookings(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Searches the in-memory booking store for records matching the given information string.
searchMovie(String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Searches the in-memory movie store for records matching the given information string.
setBookings(LinkedHashMap<String, Booking>) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.BookingRepository
Replaces the current in-memory booking store with the given map.
setCredentials(LinkedHashMap<String, Credential>) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.CredentialRepository
Replaces the current in-memory credential store with the given map.
setMovies(LinkedHashMap<String, Movie>) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
Replaces the current in-memory movie store with the given map.
setProcessed(boolean) - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
Sets the processed flag for this booking, indicating whether it has been written to BOOKINGS.csv.

T

toString() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Movie
Returns a string representation of this Movie object, listing all field values.

U

updateLatestData() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.BookingCsvIO
Persists all unprocessed bookings in memory to BOOKINGS.csv by appending them to the file and marking each as processed.
updateLatestData() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.CredentialCsvIO
Overwrites USER_CREDENTIALS.csv with the current state of all credentials held in CredentialRepository, preserving insertion order.
updateLatestData() - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.MovieCsvIO
Overwrites MOVIES.csv with the current state of all movies held in MovieRepository, merging in any unprocessed booking seat data before writing.

V

verifyCredential(String, String) - Static method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.CredentialRepository
Verifies whether the supplied email and password match an existing account in the repository.

W

writeMovieData(String) - Method in class com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.io.MovieCsvIO
Appends a single pre-formatted movie CSV row to MOVIES.csv without overwriting existing records.
